title: Ubiquiti UVC-G6-Dome-W - UniFi Video Camera G6 Dome, white
description: Notice: For this product, we provide individual project-based pricing depending on the configuration, scope, and conditions of the project. For more information, please contact your sales representative Ubiquiti UniFi Enterprise G6 Dome is a device from the Enterprise series, designed for business environments The G6 Dome is an outdoor DOME -style camera equipped with an 8MP sensor (3840 x 2160 @ 30 FPS) sized at 1/1.8", and a fixed lens with a horizontal field of view of 109.9° . The built-in IR illuminator enables the camera to capture night scenes at distances of up to 30 meters . The camera also features a microphone for ambient sound recording. Support for the Multi-TOPS AI Engine is also included, which, combined with the long-range IR illumination, creates ideal conditions for discreet… The camera can be powered via PoE with an input voltage range of 37 - 57V , supporting both the active 802.3af standard and passive PoE . The maximum power consumption of the camera is 9.25W The Multi-TOPS AI engine includes features such as face recognition, license plate recognition, and intelligent real-time detection of people, vehicles, or animals. All functions are supported directly by the camera thanks to its high processing power Camera Ceiling / wall mount Ceiling tile mount Tool kit Drilling template Mounting kit
